headline: Full Stack AI Application Developer & Project Design Lead · Nokia
summary: Full stack web application developer with a focus on React, TypeScript, Webpack 5, and Module Federation for Nokia NSP. Leads front-end design and sprint capacity for User Manager, Group Manager, and License Manager modules. Master’s in Computer Science / Data Science from the University of Ottawa (Grade A). Earlier roles include Capgemini (Angular, Willis Insurance), internships at Reliance Jio (LTE) and Siemens Networks (motor automation), plus data tooling with Power BI, DAX, Perl, and Excel/VBA during Nokia internships.
linksNote: Live profile: use the LinkedIn link in the footer or About section.
